controlled.evidence: canonical initial state and vectors establish controlled/uncontrolled open ownership

changeRequest.value: controlled values remain authoritative while dismissal requests an open change

trigger.value: compound trigger owns activation and restoration target

content.value: Dialog child owns modal content; Root owns state, Trigger, Title, Description, and Close

escape.reason: standard dialog dismissal is established, but alertdialog Escape policy is explicitly unknown

nesting.reason: nested-layer arbitration requires canonical browser execution

mode.evidence: canonical modal portal transition and inert semantic

inert.evidence: canonical semantic states outside content is inert

scrollLock.reason: scroll locking is not established by canonical evidence

contain.evidence: canonical modal semantics and key set

blockers.reason: Declarations guarantee outside-click resistance but do not state Escape policy; delegated browser evidence was not available for an exact claim.
Title/description association ids are generated by Base UI and literal values are not stable contract surface.
